## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? -->
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] One logical change, focused PR
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new logic
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) for user-facing changes
- [ ] No new network code, telemetry, or non-essential entitlements
